desc:
When Vi casts, Ekko releases 3 afterimages towards her target dealing @EkkoAfterImageReducedDamage*100@% damage. When Ekko casts, Vi slams an earthquake towards his target dealing @ViEarthquakeReducedDamage*100@% damage.

Gain a Vi and Ekko.
name: Trait: Reunion

desc: Gain a Bruiser Emblem, a Redemption, and a Sett.
name: Bruiser Crown

desc: Gain a Vladimir. Your strongest Vladimir gains +@IncRange@ Range and gains @BonusMana@ bonus Mana each attack. His Ability no longer heals but grants @TOOLTIPDamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp, deals @TOOLTIPBonusDamage*100@% bonus damage, and spreads additional damage to the nearest enemy.
name: Crimson Pact

desc: Artillerist rockets deal @IncreasedRocketDamage*100@% increased damage. Every @RocketDamageThreshold@ rockets your Artillerists fire, gain a Collector (max @MaxItems@). Gain a Tristana and Urgot. (Rockets Fired: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT13_Augment_Artillerist_TotalDamage@)
name: Rocket Collection

desc:
Jinx and Sevika gain @AD*100@% Attack Damage and @Health@ Health. Whenever one casts, they grant the other @Mana@ mana. Sevika's arm is luckier.

Gain a Jinx and Sevika.
name: Trait: Unlikely Duo

desc: Dominators gain @ShieldPercentAS*100@% Attack Speed while shielded. When a Dominator gets a kill, all Dominators gain @ShieldAmount@ Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds. Gain a Cassiopeia.
name: Domination

desc: Snipers gain +@DamageAmp@% Damage Amp for each round fought from the same starting hex (Maximum +@MaxAmp@%). Gain a Zeri.
name: Sniper's Nest

desc: Gain an Artillerist Emblem, a Runaan's Hurricane, and a Tristana.
name: Artillerist Crown

desc: Gain a Firelight Emblem and a Zeri.
name: Firelight Crest

desc: Every @RefreshSeconds@ seconds, Bruisers deal @SlamPercentHealth*100@% bonus max Health bonus physical damage on their next attack. Gain a Steb and a Trundle.
name: Heavily Smash

desc: Every @NumTakedownsPerStack@ takedowns by Black Rose champions or Sion grant Sion permanent @SionADPercentPerStack*100@% Attack Damage and @SionHealthPerStack@ Max Health. Gain 3 Black Rose champions. (Stacks: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT13_Augment_Cabal_NumStacks@)
name: Forbidden Magic

desc: Gain a Watcher Emblem and a Vander.
name: Watcher Crest

desc: Every time Watchers are attacked, they gain @IncreaseADByTakeAttack@% Attack Damage. Every time Watchers are hit by an ability, they gain @IncreaseAPByTakeSpell@ Ability Power. Gain a Vander.
name: Battle Scars

desc:
When Heimerdinger casts, Ekko releases @NumEkkoAfterImages@ afterimages, each dealing @ReducedEkkoDamage*100@% damage. When Ekko casts, Heimerdinger fires @NumHeimerMissiles@ missiles, each dealing @ReducedHeimerDamage*100@% damage.

Gain a Heimerdinger, Ekko, and a Jeweled Gauntlet.
name: Trait: Geniuses

desc: Gain a Powder. Your strongest Powder's explosion radius is increased by two hexes, has different damage falloff, but deals @TOOLTIPONLYFriendlyDamage@% damage to ALLIES.
name: This WILL Work

desc: Gain a Black Rose Emblem, a Spear of Shojin, and a Cassiopeia.
name: Black Rose Crown

desc: Gain a Conqueror Emblem, a Last Whisper, and a Rell.
name: Conqueror Crown

desc:
Maddie always targets Ambessa's target with her Ability and attacks. Every round where either gets at least @NumKills@ kills, gain a Maddie.

Gain a 2-star Maddie and Ambessa.
name: Trait: Betrayal

desc: Gain an Enforcer Emblem, an Infinity Edge, and a Maddie.
name: Enforcer Crown

desc: Whenever you build an item, gain a completed item anvil instead. That anvil always offers an Academy item and the item built. Gain @NumItems@ random components. Gain a Lux and an Ezreal.
name: Academic Research

desc: Ambusher kills have a chance to drop loot, scaling with Critical Strike Chance. The value of the loot given can also critically strike, granting even more loot. Gain a Camille and a Powder.
name: Loot Explosion

desc: Gain a Sniper Emblem and a Zeri.
name: Sniper Crest

desc: Gain a Scrap Emblem, a Ziggs, and @NumComponents@ random components.
name: Scrap Crown

desc: Champions evolved by the Anomaly drop @GoldPerRequirement@ gold every @NumKillsRequirement@ kills. Gain @FreeRerolls@ free rerolls.
name: A Golden Find

desc: Gain a Pit Fighter Emblem, a Sterak's Gage, and a Gangplank.
name: Pit Fighter Crown

desc: Enforcer champions gain @BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage. Every @WantedEnemyBreakpoint@ Wanted enemy deaths grant @BonusGoldAmount@ gold. Gain a Steb and Maddie.
name: Law Enforcement

desc: Gain an Automata Emblem, a Guardbreaker, and a Nocturne.
name: Automata Crown

desc: Gain a Sorcerer Emblem, an Adaptive Helm, and a Vladimir.
name: Sorcerer Crown

desc: Gain a Singed. Your strongest Singed cannot attack but constantly runs, leaving a poison trail dealing magic damage over time. His Ability will always target himself and instead grants @TOOLTIPONLYOmnivamp@% Omnivamp and Move Speed.
name: Mad Chemist

desc:
For every @Mana@ Mana Visionaries spend during combat, summon a Voidling, up to @MaxVoidlings@ Voidlings. Gain a Rell and Morgana.

The Voidling has @Stage2Health@-@Stage6Health@ Health based on Stage.
name: Voidcaller

desc: Gain a Firelight Emblem, a Protector's Vow, and a Scar.
name: Firelight Crown

desc:
Vander gains @MaxHealthGainPerCast@ permanent max Health each time Silco casts. Silco gains @APGainPerDeath@ permanent Ability Power each time Vander dies.

Gain a 2-star Vander, a Silco, and a Spear of Shojin.
name: Trait: What Could Have Been

desc: Firelight champions gain @FirelightBonusAD*100@% Attack Damage and @FirelightBonusAP@ Ability Power when they start a Firelight dash. They gain another @Bonus@% for every hex traveled that combat. Gain a Scar and Zeri.
name: Aerial Warfare

desc:
Gain the Sister Trait. When Vi scores a takedown, Jinx gains @ASBuff*100@% bonus Attack Speed for @JinxDuration@ seconds. When Jinx scores a takedown, Vi gains @ADBuff*100@% bonus Attack Damage for @ViDuration@ seconds.

Gain a Vi and Jinx.
name: Trait: Sisters

desc: After the Anomaly round on 4-6, gain an item that duplicates the chosen Anomaly Effect onto the equipped champion.
name: Another Anomaly

desc: Gain a Quickstriker Emblem, a Guinsoo's Rageblade, and a Nocturne.
name: Quickstriker Crown

desc: Gain a Black Rose Emblem.
name: Black Rose Crest

desc: Gain a Visionary Emblem, a Spear of Shojin, and a Renata Glasc.
name: Visionary Crown

desc: Sentinels gain @PercGain*100@% bonus Armor and Magic Resist. Every @Interval@ seconds, their next attack deals @ResistToDamageRatio*100@% of their total resistances as magic damage. Gain a Loris.
name: Shield Bash

desc: Gain a Sniper Emblem, an Infinity Edge, and a Zeri.
name: Sniper Crown

desc: Gain an Experiment Emblem and an Urgot.
name: Experiment Crest

desc: Gain a Family Emblem and a Redemption.
name: Family Crown

desc: Gain a Chem-Baron Emblem and a Renata Glasc.
name: Chem-Baron Crest

desc:
Gain a Bloodthirster. After you deal @PlayerDamage@ damage to other players, gain a Warwick and a Sterak's Gage.
(Current: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT13_Augment_WarwickDamageCount@)
name: What You Really Are

desc:
Gain an Adaptive Helm. After you upgrade @NumUpgrades@ champions, gain a Viktor and a Jeweled Gauntlet.
(Current: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT13_Augment_GrantViktor@)
name: Glorious Evolution

desc: When Sorcerers die, they deal @DeathPercentage*100@% of their Ability Power as magic damage to all adjacent units. Gain a Vladimir and Lux.
name: Arcane Retribution

desc: Gain a Sentinel Emblem and a Rell.
name: Sentinel Crest

desc: Gain 2 Rennis. Your strongest Renni's Ability costs @TOOLTIPManaReduction@ less and causes her to lunge towards the farthest enemy within @TOOLTIPHexDistance@ hexes, dealing @TOOLTIPAbilityDamage*100@% damage to the target and reduced damage to enemies in her path.
name: Brutal Revenge

desc: Gain a Vander. Your strongest Vander gains a brand new Ability that no longer grants resistances, but deals @TOOLTIPBonusDamage*100@% increased damage and punches the target backwards, dealing @TOOLTIPONLYSplashPerc*100@% of the original damage to all enemies hit.
name: Gloves Off

desc: Gain a Rebel Emblem and an Akali.
name: Rebel Crest

desc: Experiments gain @Health*100@% Health and grant a special hex. The Experiment in the hex is killed on combat start, granting their Experiment bonus to other laboratory hexes. Gain 3 Experiment champions.
name: The Mutation Survives

desc: Conquerors execute enemies below @BaseExecuteThreshold@% Health. When they do, they gain @ArmorandMagicResist@ Armor and Magic Resist for the rest of combat. Gain a Darius and Draven.
name: Noxian Guillotine

desc: Gain an Academy Emblem and a random sponsored item.
name: Academy Crown

desc: Gain a Watcher Emblem, a Steadfast Heart, and a Scar.
name: Watcher Crown

desc: Combat start and every @TimeBetweenProcs@ seconds, all Quickstrikers attack @AttackSpeed*100@% faster for @BuffDuration@ seconds. Gain a Nocturne and Akali.
name: Adrenaline Burst

desc: While you field 2 of the same Form Swapper in different forms, both gain @BonusStats@ Ability Power, Armor, and Magic Resist, and @BonusStats@% Attack Damage. When you 3-star a Form Swapper, gain a 2-star copy. Gain a Swain and Gangplank.
name: Why Not Both?

desc: Gain an Enforcer Emblem.
name: Enforcer Crest

desc:
Every @NumScrapItemsConverted@ components Scrap champions convert, gain a random component (max @MaxComponents@). Gain a Powder and a Trundle.

Converted: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT13_Augment_Scrap_NumComponents@/@NumScrapItemsConverted@
name: Top of the Scrap Heap

desc: Gain a Family Emblem.
name: Family Crest

desc: Gain an Ambusher Emblem and a Camille.
name: Ambusher Crest

desc: Gain a Quickstriker Emblem and an Akali.
name: Quickstriker Crest

desc: If at least @MinNumFamilyMembers@ Family members are alive after @TimeRequirement@ seconds in combat or at the end of combat, gain a random copy of a Vander, Powder, or Violet. Gain a Powder and Violet.
name: Welcome to the Playground

desc: Gain a Dominator Emblem, a Protector's Vow, and a Blitzcrank.
name: Dominator Crown

desc: Everytime you choose to save your Shimmer on a Black Market, heal @Heal@ player health and gain @Gold@ gold. Gain a Renni.
name: War for the Undercity

desc: Gain a Rebel Emblem, a Jeweled Gauntlet, and an Akali.
name: Rebel Crown

desc: Gain a Visionary Emblem and a Renata Glasc.
name: Visionary Crest

desc: Gain a Steb. Your strongest Steb's Ability's Mana cost is reduced by @ManaReduction@, but no longer heals. Steb's spell grants @TOOLTIPONLYOmnivamp@% Omnivamp and strikes 3 times, each dealing @TOOLTIPONLYModifiedDamage*100@%.
name: Combat Medic

desc:
Gain a Blue Buff. After starting a round with @RoundGold@ gold and winning a player combat, gain a Mel and a Hextech Gunblade.

Tasks can be completed in any order.
name: A Change Of Fate

desc: Artillerist rockets deal @IncreasedRocketDamage*100@% increased damage. Every @RocketDamageThreshold@ rockets your Artillerists fire, gain a Collector (max @MaxItems@). Gain a Tristana and Urgot. (Rockets Fired: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT13_Augment_Artillerist_TotalDamage@)
name: Rocket Collection+

desc: Gain a Bruiser Emblem and a Sett.
name: Bruiser Crest

desc: Gain a Sorcerer Emblem and a Vladimir.
name: Sorcerer Crest

desc: Gain a Pit Fighter Emblem and an Urgot.
name: Pit Fighter Crest

desc: Gain a Conqueror Emblem and a Rell.
name: Conqueror Crest

desc: Gain a Trundle. Your strongest Trundle's Ability no longer heals, but grants him @TOOLTIPONLYAS@% Attack Speed for @TOOLTIPONLYDuration@ seconds, and permanently grants him @TOOLTIPONLYADPerCast@% Attack Damage. His maximum mana is reduced by @ManaReduction@.
name: Trolling

desc: Gain an Ambusher Emblem, a Hand of Justice, and a Camille.
name: Ambusher Crown

desc:
While fielded with Silco, Powder gains Dominator, but no longer benefits from Family. When her monkey explodes, it creates @TOOLTIPONLYNumMonstrosities@ of Silco's monstrosities.

Gain a 2-star Powder and a Silco.
name: Trait: Menaces

desc: Gain @FreeAnomalyRerolls@ free Anomaly rerolls. Unused rerolls are converted to gold. Gain @InitialGold@ gold now.
name: Guided Anomaly

desc: Pit Fighters permanently gain @ADPerLoss*100@% Attack Damage if they lost the last combat. If they won, gain @HealthPerWin@ Health instead. Gain an Urgot.
name: Training Arc

desc: Gain a Chem-Baron Emblem, a Nashor's Tooth, and a Smeech.
name: Chem-Baron Crown

desc: Gain an Irelia. Your strongest Irelia gains @TOOLTIPBonusAS*100@% Attack Speed and gains a brand new Ability that dashes her between two targets, dealing physical damage to both.
name: Blade Dance

desc:
When Ambessa casts, Caitlyn fires an empowered attack at the target, dealing @TOOLTIPONLYCAITAD@% damage. Ambessa gains @TOOLTIPONLYADSHARE@% of Caitlyn's Attack Damage.

Gain a Caitlyn and Ambessa.
name: Trait: Martial Law

desc: Gain a Sentinel Emblem, a Crownguard, and a Loris.
name: Sentinel Crown

desc: Gain an Academy Emblem and a Leona.
name: Academy Crest

desc: Gain an Artillerist Emblem and a Tristana.
name: Artillerist Crest

desc: Gain a Dominator Emblem and a Blitzcrank.
name: Dominator Crest

desc: When the first @NumOfUnits@ Rebels die each combat, summon a copy of themselves that is one-star lower with @ReducedHealth@ less Health. Gain an Akali and an Irelia.
name: Paint the Town Blue

desc: Gain an Automata Emblem and a Nocturne.
name: Automata Crest

desc: Gain an Experiment Emblem, a Bloodthirster, and an Urgot.
name: Experiment Crown

desc: When an Automata champion fires their blast, they fire a second blast at the closest enemy dealing @Percentage*100@% of the original damage. Gain an Amumu and Nocturne.
name: Fractured Crystals

desc: Gain a Scrap Emblem and a Ziggs.
name: Scrap Crest

desc: Gain the Anomaly, an item which grants units a powerful evolution depending on their role. Gain @NumRemovers_TOOLTIPONLY@ Magnetic Removers.
name: Ekko's Boon

desc: Your team gains @HealthPerTacHealth@ Health for each missing player health. At the start of each player combat, gain an additional @Heal@ player health.
name: Soraka's Boon

desc: Gain a Briar, a Jinx, and an Illaoi. Increase your current and max player Health by @PlayerHealth@.
name: Anima Commander

desc: Gain a Leona. Your strongest Leona becomes an Attack Fighter that dashes through enemies to deal physical damage, stunning the first target hit.
name: Shieldmaiden

desc: Conduit Abilities last @PowerMin@% to @PowerMax@% longer, depending on the Ability. Gain a Zoe and a Mordekaiser.
name: Concentration

desc:
Choose 1 of @NumQuestOptions_TOOLTIPONLY@ quests to prove yourself to Aurelion Sol.

Chosen Quest: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_AurelionSolGodAugment@
name: Aurelion Sol's Boon

desc: Your team gains @SmallQuestADAP@ Attack Damage and Ability Power.
name: Your team gains @SmallQuestADAP@ Attack Damage and Ability Power.
After @MedQuestRounds@ player combats, gain a completed item anvil and @MedQuestGold@ gold.
After @LargeQuestRounds@ player combats, gain +1 to all non-unique traits.

desc: Gain a Mordekaiser. Your strongest Mordkaiser becomes a Magic Fighter with a slowly growing aura that deals damage over time.
name: Heat Death

desc:
Gain a Spear of Shojin. On Stage @StageNum@-@RoundNum@, gain a Zed. After receiving Zed, he can then appear in your shops.

Zed is a 5-cost Attack Fighter that creates clones of himself.
name: Invader Zed

desc: Your team gains @ADAPPerLevel@% Attack Damage and Ability Power per level. Gain @XP@ XP each round for the rest of the game.
name: Ahri's Boon

desc:
Timebreakers gain @Health@ Health and @AttackSpeed@% Attack Speed every time you reroll (including free rerolls). Gain an Ezreal and a Pantheon.

(Health: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Augment_Timebreaker_Timestream_HP@, Attack Speed: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Augment_Timebreaker_Timestream_AS*100@%)
name: Timestream

desc: The first time you would be eliminated, instead remain at 1 Health
name: Boon of Resurrection

desc:
Arbiters add a second effect to their law.
Gain a Leona and a Zoe.
name: Divine Amendment

desc: Gain an Aatrox. Your strongest Aatrox becomes an Attack Fighter with an ability that swaps between three different strikes.
name: Stellar Combo

desc: Yasuo's hexes also affect adjacent units at @Effectiveness*100@% effectiveness.
name: Yasuo's Share The Spotlight

desc: Gain a Poppy. Your strongest Poppy becomes a ranged Attack Caster that flings a high-velocity Meep at her target.
name: Termeepnal Velocity

desc: Gain a Meepsie. Your strongest Meepsie becomes a Magic Fighter that leaps to a nearby hex to deal damage in a large radius.
name: The Big Bang

desc: Gain a Pyke. Your strongest Pyke becomes an Attack Fighter, generates gold on team takedown, and gains a reset on-kill Ability.
name: Contract Killer

desc: Paint a Golden Hex. The unit in the hex gains @BonusHealth@ health, @AttackSpeed*100@% attack speed, and drops @Gold@ gold on kill.
name: Yasuo's Golden Hex

desc:
Each round, roll a die. Get a bonus based on that roll.


Health: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_ThreshGodAugment_Health@
Attack Speed: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_ThreshGodAugment_AttackSpeed@%
name: Thresh's Boon

desc: Gain a Jax. Your strongest Jax becomes a Magic Fighter that deal bonus magic damage on attack and gains stacking Attack Speed on cast.
name: Reach for the Stars

desc: Snipers gain @DamageAmp@% Damage Amp for each combat fought from the same starting hex, up to @MaxAmp@%. Gain an Ezreal and a Gnar.
name: Sniper's Nest

desc:
Choose 1 of 4 Divine Artifacts.

Artifacts are more powerful items with a unique effect.
name: Apotheotic Forge

desc: On Stage @StageNum@-@RoundNum@, gain a Sona and a Shepherd Emblem.
name: Shepherd's Song

desc: TFT17_Augment_Psionic_EmergencySupplies_Desc
name: TFT17_Augment_Psionic_EmergencySupplies_Name

desc: Your team gains @Durability*100@% Durability. Lose an additional @HP@ Tactician Health when you lose combat.
name: Evelynn's Boon

desc: Voyagers gain @HP@ Health, @AD*100@% Attack Damage, and @AP@% Ability Power, increased by @IncPercent*100@% each time you fight a new player. You prefer to fight players you haven't fought recently. Gain a Pyke and a Meepsie.
name: Tour of the Galaxy

desc:
Gain one of the four Meeplords.

(Power scales with Stage.)
name: Meep King

desc: Gain a Nasus. Your strongest Nasus becomes an Attack Fighter with a single target Ability that gets stronger with each kill.
name: Bonk!

desc: For each unique completed item on your team, your team gains @Health@ Health, @AD*100@% Attack Damage, and @AP@% Ability Power.
name: Kayle's Boon

desc: Increase the power of Yasuo's hexes by @Effectiveness*100@%. If you only have 2 hexes, gain @GoldIfTwo@ gold.
name: Yasuo's Boon

desc:
Combat start: Up to @NumComponents@ components temporarily turn into completed items. Gain @NumRemovers@ removers and a salvager.

Salvagers allow you to break completed items into components
name: Boon of the Scrapper

desc: Gain a Gragas. Your strongest Gragas becomes a Magic Fighter with a massive explosion, but also damages himself.
name: Self Destruct

desc:
Every star level of unique Dark Star units you field increases the execute threshold by @PercentPerLevel*100@%. Gain a Cho'gath and Lissandra.

Bonus Execute Percent: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_DarkStar_NeutronStar_BonusExecutePercent*100@%
name: Neutron Star

desc: Vanguard shields are @PercentStronger*100@% stronger and explode when broken, dealing @Damage@ magic damage split between enemies in a @Hex@-hex radius.
name: Divine Paladins

desc: Your team gains @Health@ health for each total star level in your army, and your 5 cost odds increase by @PercentIncrease@%.
name: Varus's Boon

desc: Gain @Health@ Tactician Health. Your rightmost shop slot costs Tactician Health instead of gold.
name: Blood Price

desc:
At the start of each round, if the combined Health of all your unique Brawlers is high enough, gain a reward and increase the threshold (up to four times). Gain a Cho'Gath and a Gragas.

@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_Weightlifting_RewardName@@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_Weightlifting_CurrentHealth@ / @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_Weightlifting_MaxHealth@
name: Lift Off

desc:
When the Black Hole consumes enemies, it turns them into space matter. After acquiring enough, the Black Hole turns it into loot! Gain a Cho'gath and a Lissandra.

Space matter and loot quality increase each time. Gain @TwoPiecePoints@/@FourPiecePoints@/@SixPiecePoints@ space matter depending on Dark Star breakpoint.

Space Matter: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_DarkStar_WhiteHole_CurrentStacks@ / @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_DarkStar_WhiteHole_StacksToNextCashout@
name: Loot Singularity

desc:
All 3-star champions now count towards Swarmling power. At level @LevelRequirement@, while fielding @Num3StarUnits@ unique 3-star champions, Primordians summon the Apex Primordian. Gain 3 Primordian Champions and 2 Tiny Duplicators.

Unique 3-Star Champions Fielded: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_PrimordianPrismaticAugment_TotalStarredUnits@ / @Num3StarUnits@

Levels: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_PrimordianPrismaticAugment_TotalLevel@ / @LevelRequirement@
name: Heart of the Swarm

Wound: Reduces healing received

desc:
The first time you fall below @HealthThreshold1*100@%, @HealthThreshold2*100@%, @HealthThreshold3*100@%, and @HealthThreshold4*100@% health, gain a @ShieldPercent*100@% max health shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds. When this happens, release a frost nova that stuns enemies within @HexRange@ hexes for @StunDuration@ seconds and deals magic damage equal to @MaxHealthDamage*100@% of their max Health.

The radius increases by @HexRangeIncreasePerProc@ each nova.

Recommended Roles: Attack or Magic Tank

name: Lose @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT16_Explorer_QuestVariable1@ player combats.

desc:
The holder has a fixed Attack Speed of @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Maestro.:JhinAttackSpeed@, and each @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Maestro.:BonusAttackSpeed@% of bonus Attack Speed is converted to @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Maestro.:BonusAttackDamage@% Attack Damage.

After summoning 4 Grand Finale Rifles, they begin firing at the same rate as the holder, dealing @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Maestro.:RifleADScalar*100@% %i:scaleAD% + @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Maestro.:RifleAPScalar*100@% %i:scaleAP% physical damage.

Every 4th volley is Harmonic, and deals @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_Maestro_HarmonicDamage_BatonTooltip*100@% of the damage the holder and their Rifles have done since the last Harmonic volley.
name: Maestros Baton

desc:
Your team heals a percentage of their max Health every @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mascot.1:Seconds@ seconds.

When a champion dies, they retreat to the sidelines to cheer on your team. Your team's healing increases for each cheering champion.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mascot.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mascot.1:BaseHealthRegen@% %i:scaleHealth% base, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mascot.1:HealthRegenPerMascot@% %i:scaleHealth% per cheering champion
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mascot.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mascot.2:BaseHealthRegen@% %i:scaleHealth% base, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mascot.2:HealthRegenPerMascot@% %i:scaleHealth% per cheering champion
name: Mascot

desc: Every @Duration@ seconds, revive the strongest ally that hasn't been revived yet at @HPPercent*100@% of their maximum Health.
name: Tome of Mending

desc:
After @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.1:FirstDelay@ seconds of combat, the Dragon strikes the board, dealing true damage and stunning all enemies. Allies gain Attack Speed for the rest of combat.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.1:TrueDamageHPRatio*100@% %i:scaleHealth% damage, Stuns for @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.1:StunDuration@ seconds, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.1:AttackSpeedBuff*100@% %i:scaleAS%.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.2:TrueDamageHPRatio*100@% %i:scaleHealth% damage, Stuns for @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.2:StunDuration@ seconds, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.2:AttackSpeedBuff*100@% %i:scaleAS%.
After an additional @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.2:SecondDelay@ seconds, the Dragon strikes again.
name: Dragonlord

desc:
Gain a spotlight hex.
Combat start: the unit standing in the spotlight gains bonus stats.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Socialite.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Socialite.1:DamagePercent*100@% %i:scaleDA% and @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Socialite.1:ManaPerSecond@ %i:scaleMana% per second.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Socialite.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Socialite.2:DamagePercent*100@% %i:scaleDA%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Socialite.2:ManaPerSecond@ %i:scaleMana% per second, and @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Socialite.2:OmnivampPercent*100@% %i:scaleSV%. Gain another spotlight hex.
name: Socialite

desc:
Your team gains @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pentakill.1:Damage_Reduction*100@% Durability and Damage Amp. For each champion kill, a champion on your team rocks out, increasing this bonus Damage Amp by @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pentakill.:Kill_Bonus*100@%.

On the @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pentakill.:Kill_Count@th kill, your entire team rocks out and gains Attack Speed.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pentakill.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pentakill.1:Bonus_Damage*100@% %i:scaleDA%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pentakill.1:Attack_Speed*100@% Attack Speed after a Pentakill.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pentakill.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pentakill.2:Bonus_Damage*100@% %i:scaleDA%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pentakill.2:Attack_Speed*100@% Attack Speed after a Pentakill.
name: Pentakill

desc: Kayle deals @DamageAmpPercent*100@% more damage. When she casts, she fires two waves.
name: Tome of Power

desc: Kayle deals @DamageAmpPercent*100@% more damage. Her attacks now hit in a @HexRadius@-hex radius around the target
name: Tome of Swiftness

desc:
Gain 2 Mountain hexes in the front row.
Combat start: units standing on a Mountain hex gain a Shield and permanent bonus Health.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mountain.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mountain.1:ShieldValue@ Shield, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mountain.1:PermBonusHealth@ %i:scaleHealth%.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mountain.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mountain.2:ShieldValue@ Shield, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mountain.2:PermBonusHealth@ %i:scaleHealth%. The entire front row becomes Mountain hexes.
name: Mountain

desc:
Total Chrome: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_Nitro_TotalScrap@
Total Bonuses: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_Nitro_TotalBonusAP@% %i:scaleAP% / @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_Nitro_TotalBonusHP@ %i:scaleHealth%
name: Chrome

desc:
Gain Shimmerscale items. These items give gold as well as combat power.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shimmerscale.1:MinUnits@)Gain Goldmancers Staff. At Stage @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shimmerscale.1:SecondItemStage@-@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shimmerscale.1:SecondItemRound@ gain Draven's Axe.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shimmerscale.2:MinUnits@)Gain Crown of Champions.
name: Shimmerscale

desc:
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Ixtal.1:MinUnits@) Complete Quests to earn Sunshards (%i:Set16Ixtal%) and spend them for loot!
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Ixtal.2:MinUnits@) Heal 2 player health at the start of player combat. Find @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Ixtal.2:BonusClues@ %i:Set16Ixtal% at the end of combat, and you can now unlock Brock after reaching 500 %i:Set16Ixtal%!

Completing a Quest before combat ends grants you a new one at the start of next round.

Total Sunshards Earned: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_Explorer_TotalExplorerPoints@ %i:Set16Ixtal%
name: Ixtal

desc:
Summon the Nocturnus to aid you in battle! It fires a rocket that deals @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_TheCrew.1:BaseRocketDamage@ magic damage every @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_TheCrew.1:BaseDamageThreshold@ damage your team deals.

2-cost and higher champions become Crew members after reaching 3-star. Gain additional bonuses for each Crew member.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_TheCrew.1:MinUnits@) 2 max Crew members.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_TheCrew.2:MinUnits@) 4 maximum Crew members.

(1x %i:3StarEnabled%): + @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_TheCrew.1:OnARollRolls@ free rerolls when you star up a unit you fielded last combat.
(2x %i:3StarEnabled%): Rockets deal @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_TheCrew.1:UpgradedRocketDamage@ damage.
(3x %i:3StarEnabled%): + @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_TheCrew.1:FreeRerollsPerRound@ free reroll / round.
(4x %i:3StarEnabled%): Rockets fire every @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_TheCrew.1:UpgradedDamageThreshold@ damage dealt. Gain @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_TheCrew.1:XPPerRound@ XP per round.
name: The Crew

desc:
Your champions gain Bees that deal magic damage to their targets every @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Honeymancy:Period@ seconds. Bee damage is based on the damage dealt and taken by the host champion, plus a flat amount per Bee.

When a champion dies, they leave @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Honeymancy:NumTransfers@ bees that follow nearby champions for the rest of combat.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Honeymancy.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Honeymancy.1:MiniCount@ Bees, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Honeymancy.1:BonusDamage*100@% Damage dealt, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Honeymancy.1:DamageReceived*100@% damage taken, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Honeymancy.1:DamagePerMini@ damage per Bee.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Honeymancy.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Honeymancy.2:MiniCount@ Bees, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Honeymancy.2:BonusDamage*100@% Damage dealt, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Honeymancy.2:DamageReceived*100@% damage taken, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Honeymancy.2:DamagePerMini@ damage per Bee.
name: Honeymancy

desc:
Your team's takedowns grant stacks of Conquest. After gaining enough Conquest, open War Chests full of loot!

Your team gains Attack Damage and Ability Power, increased by @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Conqueror:PercentIncreasePerChest*100@% for each War Chest opened.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Conqueror.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Conqueror.1:ADAPBase*100@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%; @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Conqueror.1:StacksPerKill@x Conquest
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Conqueror.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Conqueror.2:ADAPBase*100@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%; @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Conqueror.2:StacksPerKill@x Conquest

War Chests Opened: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_Conqueror_ChestsCompleted@
Current Stats: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_Conqueror_CurrentADAP@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%
name: Conqueror

desc:
Your team gain bonus Health, Attack Damage and Ability Power, which increases by 1% every time you spend gold on a Shop reroll.

After each combat, gain a 1 gold reroll for that round. Your first reroll each round grants @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Punk:FIRST_ROLL_BONUS@% bonus instead!

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Punk.1:MinUnits@ )@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Punk.1:BONUS_HEALTH@ %i:scaleHealth% and @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Punk.1:BONUS_AD_AP*100@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Punk.2:MinUnits@ )@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Punk.2:BONUS_HEALTH@ %i:scaleHealth% and @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Punk.2:BONUS_AD_AP*100@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%

Current Bonus: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_Punk_CurrentBonus@%
@TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_Punk_CurrentHealthBonus@ %i:scaleHealth% and @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_Punk_CurrentADBonus@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%
name: Punk

desc:
Summon a Hero named Kayle and evolve her as you level up!

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver.1:MinUnits@) When you reach level @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver:FirstArmoryLevel@, Kayle upgrades to 2-star. Pick a supportive effect.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver.2:MinUnits@) Kayle evolves again at levels @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver:SecondArmoryLevel@, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver:ThirdArmoryLevel@ and @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver:FourStarUpgradeLevel@:
Level @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver:SecondArmoryLevel@: Pick a combat effect.
Level @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver:ThirdArmoryLevel@: Kayle upgrades to 3-star. Pick a combat effect.
Level @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver:FourStarUpgradeLevel@: Kayle upgrades to 4-star.
name: Storyweaver

desc:
Gain a Glacial Mallet. Attacks from champions holding a mallet have a @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Glacial.1:ProcPercent*100@% chance to stun their target for @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Glacial.1:StunDuration@ second and deal bonus magic damage.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Glacial.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Glacial.1:BonusDamage@ magic damage.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Glacial.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Glacial.2:BonusDamage@ magic damage. Gain another Glacial Mallet.
name: Glacial

desc:
Use the Pilot Selector to choose a Pilot. Combat start: the Pilot jumps into a Mech.

The Mech has the traits and items of its Pilot, and gains a percent of the pilot's Attack Damage and max Health. When the Mech dies, the Pilot(s) are ejected with @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_MechPilot.1:EjectedPilotHealthPercent@% of their max Health.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_MechPilot.1:MinUnits@) Mini-Mech: @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_MechPilot.1:MechCombinedADRatio*100@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleHealth%
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_MechPilot.2:MinUnits@) Super-Mech: @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_MechPilot.2:MechCombinedADRatio*100@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleHealth%. The 2 nearest units to the Pilot also jump into the Mech.
name: Mech-Pilot

desc:
Your team gains @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pyro:BaseASPct@% %i:scaleAS% Attack Speed.

For each kill, your team creates an infernal cinder that you collect the next round. For every @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pyro:NumCinders@ cinders you collect, your team gains @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pyro:ASPctPerNumCinders@% more %i:scaleAS%.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pyro.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pyro.1:NumCindersPerKill@ infernal cinder per enemy.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pyro.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pyro.2:NumCindersPerKill@ infernal cinders per enemy and execute enemies under @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pyro.2:ExecutePct@% Health.

Cinders collected: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_PyroCindersCollected@
Team %i:scaleAS%: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_PyroAttackSpeed@%
name: Pyro

desc:
For each active trait, your team gains bonus Health and Damage Amp.
(Excludes unique and Anniversary Traits)

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Jazz.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Jazz.1:BonusHealth*100@% %i:scaleHealth%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Jazz.1:BonusDamage*100@% %i:scaleDA%
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Jazz.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Jazz.2:BonusHealth*100@% %i:scaleHealth%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Jazz.2:BonusDamage*100@% %i:scaleDA%

Bonus Health: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT10_Trait_Jazz_TraitTracker_CurrentBonus@%
Bonus Damage Amp: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT10_Trait_Jazz_TraitTracker_CurrentBonus_Damage@%
name: Jazz

desc: Use this on a champion to make it the Overlord
name: Overlord Selector

desc:
Each time your team loses @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Demacia.1:MaxHealthLost*100@% max Health, they Rally, reducing their Mana cost by @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Demacia.1:ManaReductionPct*100@%. Your team gains Armor and Magic Resist.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Demacia.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Demacia.1:ArmorMR@ %i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Demacia.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Demacia.2:ArmorMR@ %i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%. Unlock Galio. On Rally, reduce Mana costs of your team by @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Demacia.2:ManaReductionPctPerGalioItem*100@% for each item equipped to your strongest Galio, and smite enemies for @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Demacia.2:EnemyTrueDamage*100@% of their max Health.
name: Demacia

desc:
Your team gains a Shield and Damage Amp for each adjacent ally.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Rebel.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Rebel.1:ShieldAmount@ Shield for @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Rebel.1:ShieldDuration@ seconds, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Rebel.1:DamageAmp@% %i:scaleDA%
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Rebel.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Rebel.2:ShieldAmount@ Shield for @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Rebel.2:ShieldDuration@ seconds, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Rebel.2:DamageAmp@% %i:scaleDA%
name: Rebel

desc: Grant Kayle and adjacent allies in the same row @APAmt@ Ability Power.
name: Talisman of Might

desc: Grant Kayle and adjacent allies in the same row @ASAmt*100@% Attack Speed.
name: Talisman of Speed

desc:
Gain a Maestro's Baton.
The holder has a fixed Attack Speed, and converts bonus Attack Speed to Attack Damage.

Every @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Maestro.1:NumAutosToSpawnJhinGun@ attacks, the Maestro summons a Grand Finale Rifle into one of your empty bench slots, up to 4. After summoning 4, they fire at the same rate as the Maestro, dealing physical damage.
Every 4th volley is Harmonic, dealing a percentage of the total damage the Maestro and their Rifles have done since the last Harmonic volley.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Maestro.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Maestro.1:EmpoweredShotEchoDamagePercentage*100@% Harmonic Damage.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Maestro.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Maestro.2:EmpoweredShotEchoDamagePercentage*100@% Harmonic Damage.
The Maestro can summon more than 4 Rifles. Combat Start: summon 1 Rifle into an empty bench slot.
name: Maestro

desc:
Use this on a champion to make it the Pilot of the Mech.

[Cannot be used on champions in combat.]
[Unlimited uses]
name: Pilot Selector

desc:
Gain a Lavender Crown. After the first @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Empress.1:DelayForInitialCoralSpawn@ seconds of combat, spawn a Void Coral near the holder's current target.
The holder blinks to the Coral's location and consumes it, gaining max Health, Attack Damage, and Ability Power, and deals magic damage to enemies within @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Empress.1:HexRange@ hexes.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Empress.1:MinUnits@) Coral grants @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Empress.1:PercentBonusMaxHealth*100@% max Health increase, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Empress.1:BonusAD*100@% %i:scaleAD% %i:scaleAP%.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Empress.2:MinUnits@) Kills now leave behind additional Void Corals. First Coral grants @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Empress.2:PercentBonusMaxHealth*100@% max Health increase and @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Empress.2:BonusAD*100@% %i:scaleAD% %i:scaleAP%; consuming further Corals heal the holder for @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Empress.2:PercentHealthHeal*100@% %i:scaleHealth% and grant an additional @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Empress.2:StackingBonusAD*100@% %i:scaleAD% %i:scaleAP%.
name: Empress

desc:
At the times shown in the High Roller trait, roll a random Jinx mod:
- Rocket: Launch @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller_NumRockets@ rockets at random enemies, dealing
@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller.1:Spell1RocketADScalar*100@% Attack Damage + @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller.1:Spell1RocketAPScalar*100@% Ability Power physical damage per rocket.
- Shield: Gain a @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller_ShieldFlatAmount@ + @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller_ShieldMaxHPPercentage@% max Health Shield for @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller.1:Spell2ShieldDuration@ seconds.
- Gold: Gain @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller_GoldAmount@ gold.
name: Sevika's Jinxed Arm

desc:
Grant %i:scaleAP% @AbilityPowerPerGold@ Ability Power per %i:goldCoins% gold in your bank (up to %i:goldCoins% @AbilityPowerGoldMax@ gold) and a @OnKillProcChance*100@% chance to drop %i:goldCoins% @OnKillProcGold@ gold on enemy kill.

Gold generated this game: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_GoldGenerated@
name: Goldmancer's Staff

desc:
Every @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Elderwood.1:TickRate@ seconds your team grows, gaining bonus stats. This effect stacks up to @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Elderwood.1:MaxStacks@ times.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Elderwood.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Elderwood.1:BonusResists@ %i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Elderwood.1:BonusADSP@ %i:scaleAP%%i:scaleAD%
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Elderwood.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Elderwood.2:BonusResists@ %i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Elderwood.2:BonusADSP@ %i:scaleAP%%i:scaleAD%
name: Elderwood

desc:
Attacks have a @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_Glacial_StunChance@% chance to stun enemies for @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Glacial.1:StunDuration@ second and deal @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_Glacial_BonusDamage@ bonus magic damage.

[Unique - only 1 per champion]
name: Glacial Mallet

desc:
Gain Boss Knuckles. When the holder first drops below @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Boss.1:HealthThreshold*100@% Health, they become The Boss and leave combat to start doing sit-ups. Each sit-up restores maximum Health and grants Attack Speed.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Boss.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Boss.1:HealPercent*100@% %i:scaleHealth%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Boss.1:AttackSpeedPercent*100@% %i:scaleAS%.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Boss.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Boss.2:HealPercent*100@% %i:scaleHealth%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Boss.2:AttackSpeedPercent*100@% %i:scaleAS%. If they reach full Health they return to combat Pumped Up: all of their attacks and abilities deal @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Boss.2:TrueDamagePercentage*100@% of damage as true damage.
name: The Boss

desc:
After each player combat, gain a Yordle Grab Bag full of Yordle-y loot!

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Yordle.1:MinUnits@) Gain a Yordle Grab Bag!
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Yordle.2:MinUnits@) If you have @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Yordle.2:NumOfThreeStarsNeeded@ or more 3-star champions, your Yordle Grab Bag will contain a Yordle-Lord.
name: Yordle

desc:
Combat start: random enemies have their Health reduced.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Phantom.1:MinUnits@) Set @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Phantom.1:NumUnitsToReduce@ enemy's Health to @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Phantom.1:PercentHealth*100@% maximum Health.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Phantom.2:MinUnits@) Set @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Phantom.2:NumUnitsToReduce@ enemies' Health to @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Phantom.2:FlatHealth@.
name: Phantom

desc:
After every player combat, your champions grant Chrome to R-080T, based on their star level. Each Chrome grants @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Nitro.:HealthPerScrap@ Health and @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Nitro.:APPerScrap@ Ability Power.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Nitro.1:MinUnits@) Summon R-080T!
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Nitro.2:MinUnits@) Upgrade R-080T to T-43X! At @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Nitro.:FourStarScrapThreshold@ Chrome, upgradeT-43X to fire a giant laser!

Chrome per star: @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Nitro.:ScrapPerOneStar@/@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Nitro.:ScrapPerTwoStar@/@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Nitro.:ScrapPerThreeStar@/@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Nitro.:ScrapPerFourStar@
name: Nitro

desc:
When an allied champion dies, a Doppelhellion (a one less star copy) equipped with a Red Buff will leap from the Hellion portal and join the fight!

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Hellion.1:MinUnits@) The first @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Hellion.1:NumOfUnits@ champions
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Hellion.2:MinUnits@) The first @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Hellion.2:NumOfUnits@ champions
name: Hellion

desc: Attacks grant Kayle @ASAmt*100@% stacking Attack Speed.
name: Scroll of Haste

desc: Kayle's Ability hits a wider area and deals @APAmt*100@% more damage.
name: Scroll of Force

desc:
Your Tanks have a maximum amount of damage they can take from a single attack or ability hit for the first few seconds of combat.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Crystal.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Crystal.1:DamageThreshold@ max damage, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Crystal.1:Duration@ seconds.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Crystal.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Crystal.2:DamageThreshold@ max damage, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Crystal.2:Duration@ seconds.
name: Crystal

desc: Kayle's damaging attacks and abilities @ResistPercent*100@% <TFTKeyword>Shred</TFTKeyword> and <TFTKeyword>Sunder</TFTKeyword> enemies hit for @Duration@ seconds.
name: Talisman of Aid

desc:
Your team's attacks and Abilities mark enemies. The mark stores a percentage of damage dealt to the enemy.

Marked enemies are struck by a cannonball after @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Bilgewater.1:BarrageInterval@ seconds, dealing the stored damage plus a flat value as physical damage.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Bilgewater.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Bilgewater.1:Damage@ + @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Bilgewater.1:DamagePercent@% damage dealt
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Bilgewater.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Bilgewater.2:Damage@ + @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Bilgewater.2:DamagePercent@% damage dealt. Every @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Bilgewater.2:ShotsUntilTreasure@th cannonball is replaced with a treasure chest that drops gold!
name: Bilgewater

desc:
Your team gains Omnivamp and summons a H4ckerr!m. Enemies it passes through are H4ck3d, losing @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Hacker.1:PercentArmorToRemove*100@% of their Armor and Magic Resist.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Hacker.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Hacker.1:Omnivamp*100@% %i:scaleSV%
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Hacker.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Hacker.2:Omnivamp*100@% %i:scaleSV%, AND see your next opponent. Gain a rider hex that sends its unit to the enemy backline at combat start. The rider gains @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Hacker.2:Horsevamp*100@% %i:scaleSV% instead, and their kills have a @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Hacker.2:PercentChanceToDropGoldOnKill*100@% chance to drop 1 gold.

Total Gold Earned: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_Hacker_RiderGold_Earned@
name: Hacker

desc:
Hover one champion over another to form a pair and unlock a Fated Bonus, based on the role of the champions.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Fated.1:MinUnits@) Pair gets the Fated Bonus and gains @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Fated.1:PairHPBonus*100@% max Health.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Fated.2:MinUnits@) ALL units get the Fated Bonus. The pair gets gains @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Fated.1:PairHPBonus*100@% max Health and @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Fated.2:PairBondIncreasePercent*100@% of the Fated Bonus.

Fated Bonuses:
Assassins: @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Fated.1:YasuoBuffBonus@ Shield on combat start
Casters: @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Fated.1:AhriBuffBonus*100@% %i:scaleAD% %i:scaleAP%
Fighters: @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Fated.1:SettBuffBonus*100@% %i:scaleSV%
Marksmen: @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Fated.1:KindredBuffBonus*100@% %i:scaleAS%
Specialists: Deal @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Fated.1:SyndraBuffBonus*100@% of damage as true damage
Tanks: @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Fated.1:ThreshBuffBonus@ %i:scaleArmor% %i:scaleMR%

Your units can only benefit from a single instance of a specific fated bonus.
name: Fated

desc:
Your team heals for a percent of their max Health every @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Preserver.1:Duration@ seconds. If they are full Health, restore Mana instead.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Preserver.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Preserver.1:HealthPct*100@% %i:scaleHealth%, or @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Preserver.1:ManaPct*100@% %i:scaleMana%.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Preserver.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Preserver.2:HealthPct*100@% %i:scaleHealth%, and @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Preserver.2:ManaPct*100@% %i:scaleMana%. Always get both.
name: Renewer

desc:
Gain a Sevika's Jinxed Arm!

Combat start: roll a random Jinx mod. Roll another one:
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller.1:MinUnits@) after @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller.1:RollingFrequency@ seconds.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller.2:MinUnits@) every @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller.2:RollingFrequency@ seconds. Mods are stronger, and the holder can now hit a Jinxed Jackpot!

Mods:
- Rocket: Launch rockets at random enemies.
- Shield: Gain a shield for @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller.1:Spell2ShieldDuration@ seconds.
- Coin: Gain gold.

Rockets Fired: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller_RocketsFired@
Shields Gained: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller_ShieldsGained@
Gold Gained: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller_GoldGained@
Jackpots Hit: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller_JackpotsHit@
name: High Roller

desc:
Once per combat at 60% Health, become The Boss and leave combat to start doing sit-ups. Each sit-up restores @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_Boss_HealPercent@% max Health and grants @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_Boss_AttackSpeedPercent@% Attack Speed. If all allies die, The Boss will immediately return to combat.

[Unique - only 1 per champion]
name: Boss Knuckles

desc:
After combat, the 3 champions closest to Nomsy feed her 1 Snax per star level, adding Health and Ability Power. Nomsy's star level increases every 25 Snax!

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Trainer.1:MinUnits@) Summon Nomsy!
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Trainer.2:MinUnits@) Nomsy's Ability deals @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Trainer.2:DamageInc*100@% bonus damage
name: Trainer

desc:
Combat start: select champions Ascend and gain @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shurima.1:BonusHealthPercent*100@% maximum Health %i:scaleHealth% and @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shurima.1:BonusASPercent*100@% Attack Speed %i:scaleAS%.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shurima.1:MinUnits@) The strongest champion Ascends after @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shurima.1:SecondsToAscend@ seconds.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shurima.2:MinUnits@) The @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shurima.2:NumUnitsToAscend@ strongest champions Ascend immediately.
name: Shurima

desc:
When the holder consumes a Void Coral, they blink to its location and deal @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Empress.1:PercentADDamage*100@% %i:scaleAD% + @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Empress.1:PercentAPDamage*100@% %i:scaleAP% magic damage to enemies within @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Empress.1:HexRange@ hexes.

Consuming the first Coral increases the holder's max Health by @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_Empress_FirstCoralHealthPercentageIncrease@% and grants @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_Empress_FirstCoralADIncrease@% %i:scaleAD% and @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_Empress_FirstCoralAPIncrease@% %i:scaleAP%.

@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_Empress_PrismaticItemTooltipFooter@
name: Lavender Crown

desc:
Use the Overlord Selector to choose an Overlord.

The Overlord takes a bite out of the unit in the hex behind them, dealing true damage to that unit.
The Overlord gains the same amount of health as the chomp deals, and gains a percentage of that unit's Attack Damage and Ability Power.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Overlord.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Overlord.1:HPPercentDamage*100@% max Health true damage, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Overlord.1:PercentADAPGain*100@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Overlord.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Overlord.2:HPPercentDamage*100@% max Health true damage, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Overlord.2:PercentADAPGain*100@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%.
Take a bite out of two units. Damage from the Overlord's attacks and abilities 30% Shred, 30% Sunder, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Overlord.2:EnemyDamageReduction*100@% Weaken, and 33% Wound enemies for @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Overlord.2:DebuffDuration@ seconds. These effects do not stack.

Shred: Reduce Magic Resist
Sunder: Reduce Armor
Weaken: Reduce Damage dealt
Wound: Reduces healing received
name: Overlord

desc:
Nomsy needs to eat this many more Snax to level up!

[This does not count as an item.]
name: Delicious Snax

desc:
Gain %i:scaleAD% @AttackDamagePerGold@% Attack Damage per %i:goldCoins% gold in your bank (up to %i:goldCoins% @AttackDamageGoldLimit@ gold).

Attacks grant @StacksPerAttack@ stack, up to @CashoutStacks@ times. At full stacks, grant %i:goldCoins% @CashoutGold@ gold.

[Unique - only 1 per champion]

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Imperial.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Imperial.1:NumOfUnits@ random champions.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Imperial.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Imperial.2:NumOfUnits@ random champions.

The unit nearest to the center of your team is chosen as the Coven Leader, gaining bonus Ability Power.

Whenever your team casts an Ability, the Coven Leader gains Mana.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Coven.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Coven.1:AbilityPower@ %i:scaleAP%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Coven.1:ManaToGive@ %i:scaleMana%
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Coven.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Coven.2:AbilityPower@ %i:scaleAP%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Coven.2:ManaToGive@ %i:scaleMana%

desc:
Every @SecondsForEmpoweredAttack@ seconds, the next attack deals @AttackGoldMultiplier@x the amount of %i:goldCoins% gold in your bank in true damage.

[Unique - only 1 per champion]
This does no damage if you have 0 gold.
name: Crown Of Champions

desc:
Upon dealing or taking damage @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Ghostly:NumInstances@ times, units send @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Ghostly:NumSpectres@ spectres to haunt nearby enemies and heal @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Ghostly:HealingPercent*100@% max Health every @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Ghostly:TickRate@ seconds.

Haunted enemies take bonus damage for each spectre on them, and pass spectres on death.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Ghostly.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Ghostly.1:DamagePercent*100@% per spectre
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Ghostly.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Ghostly.2:DamagePercent*100@% per spectre
name: Ghostly

desc:
Your team gains laser drones. When a unit attacks or is hit by an attack, their drone deals magic damage to the target (@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_LaserCorps.1:ICD@ second cooldown). Drones are reassigned to another ally on death.

(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_LaserCorps.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_LaserCorps.1:MagicDamage@ magic damage.
(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_LaserCorps.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_LaserCorps.2:MagicDamage@ magic damage. All units gain an additional drone.
